pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh script verifying the output location.
Task instructions defining exactly what the agent should output and verifier.py confirming these columns.

Extracted from the actual Muncie project data (Linux_RAS_v66.zip) provided in the environment. Parsing the HDF5 geometry data (Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf) and text geometry (Muncie.x04) shows the main channel Manning's n is 0.04 across all cross-sections, contradicting the metadata claim of 0.035.

privileged_info_summary: The expected output path and required CSV columns are verified against the task instructions and verifier script. However, the claimed target Manning's n of 0.035 is contradicted by the actual HEC-RAS geometry data; parsing the Muncie project files (Muncie.x04 and HDF5 geometry) confirms the main channel Manning's n is actually 0.04.
